source: Generated from a per-system Morphous manifest and prompt records. CSS variables are shadcn/tweakcn-compatible.
typography: Compact English recipe UI with Japanese typography guidance for ingredient quantities, prep steps, kitchen timers, nutrition values, command search, and calm status messaging.
layout: Dense recipe dashboards, compact navigation, 8px radii, olive-green actions, stone-grey surfaces, pale lilac status accents, herb-sprig texture, and low garden-stone shadows.

prompts.label: Transparent Thyme motif
prompts.prompt:
Use case: photorealistic-natural
Asset type: Morphous Thyme transparent motif chroma-key source
Primary request: Create only a compact thyme sprig, isolated full subject, no environment, no props, no text.
Scene/backdrop: perfectly flat solid #ff00ff chroma-key background for background removal.
Subject: a single herbaceous thyme sprig with many tiny oval olive-green leaves, thin woody green-brown stems, a few very small pale lilac thyme blossoms, subtle stone-grey underside shadows, natural botanical detail, compact recipe-system identity.
Style/medium: high-detail botanical cutout, realistic painted-photographic finish, crisp opaque edges, clean studio light, natural herbal texture.
Composition/framing: centered complete cutout with generous padding on all sides; diagonal but fully visible sprig; no cropping; no floor plane.
Lighting/mood: restrained stone-garden calm, compact and precise, no cast shadow and no contact shadow.
Color palette: olive green tiny leaves, pale lilac blossoms, warm woody stems, stone grey botanical shadows only; do not use magenta in the subject.
Transparent workflow: place the subject on a perfectly flat solid #ff00ff chroma-key background for removal. The background must be one uniform color with no shadows, gradients, texture, reflections, floor plane, or lighting variation.
Constraints: keep subject fully separated from the background with crisp edges; no text, no watermark, no props, no pot, no garden, no second sprig, no decorative background, no extra saturated colors.

prompts.label: Light-mode design-system board
prompts.prompt:
Use case: ui-mockup
Asset type: 16:9 high-resolution light-mode design-system board for Morphous catalog
Input images: the visible transparent Thyme motif is the source reference for colors, texture, shape language, and system identity.
Primary request: Generate a comprehensive light-mode shadcn/tweakcn-like design-system board titled "Morphous Thyme".
Canvas: 3840 x 2160, wide 16:9 board, crisp readable UI labels and token names, no tiny text.
Required visible sections: palette, type, Japanese typography, components, navigation, dashboard/data, forms, tables, command/search, status, tokens, texture, radius, spacing, shadows.
System mood: compact recipe system for ingredient prep, kitchen inventory, cook timers, recipe cards, nutrition, and batch planning; dense, calm, precise, herbal, operational, 8px radii throughout.
Color palette: derive only from the reference motif and stone-garden context: olive green thyme leaves, deep herb green shadows, tiny pale lilac blossoms, stone grey surfaces, warm woody stem brown, off-white flower highlights, muted garden-sand neutrals. Use no generic blue, purple gradient, orange default, or unrelated saturated color.
Layout: polished product design board, left palette/token rail, central component and form examples, right dashboard/table/search/status modules, bottom row for texture, radius, spacing, and shadow samples. Include a small thyme motif cutout preview.
Typography: compact English UI type plus Japanese typography section with headings, body, captions, numerals, and examples such as "タイム", "材料", "下ごしらえ", "分量", "調理時間".
Components: primary and secondary buttons, icon buttons, inputs, select, textarea, checkbox, radio, switch, tabs, badges, alert, card, table rows, command/search palette, compact sidebar navigation, recipe metric cards, pantry stock cards, prep checklist, ingredient table, nutrition chart, timer bars, loading/empty/error/success states.
Texture/materials: subtle tiny-leaf rhythm, stone-garden grain, pale lilac blossom pin marks, warm stem dividers, compact 8px card rhythm, low shadow elevation.
Constraints: every visible UI element uses 8px radius or less; labels must fit inside containers; professional shadcn/tweakcn-style product design board; no marketing hero, no abstract gradients, no unrelated colors, no generic saturated food-app palette, no watermark.

prompts.label: Dark-mode design-system board
prompts.prompt:
Use case: ui-mockup
Asset type: 16:9 high-resolution dark-mode design-system board for Morphous catalog
Input images: the visible transparent Thyme motif and the visible Morphous Thyme light design-system board are source references.
Primary request: Generate a separate dark-mode translation titled exactly "Morphous Thyme" with the same compact recipe-system coverage and layout logic as the light board.
Canvas: 3840 x 2160, wide 16:9 board, crisp readable UI labels and token names, no tiny text.
Required visible sections: dark palette, type, Japanese typography, components, navigation, dashboard/data, forms, tables, command/search, status, tokens, texture, radius, spacing, shadows.
System mood: compact recipe system for ingredient prep, kitchen inventory, cook timers, recipe cards, nutrition, and batch planning; night-mode kitchen operations, dense, calm, precise, herbal, 8px radii throughout.
Color palette: derive only from the thyme sprig and stone-garden palette: deep herb charcoal backgrounds, dark olive panels, sage green controls, pale lilac blossom accents, stone grey borders, warm stem brown warning accents, off-white flower text highlights. Avoid generic blue/purple gradients, neon colors, saturated orange, and pure flat black.
Layout: polished dark product design board, left palette/token rail, central component and form examples, right dashboard/table/search/status modules, bottom row for texture, radius, spacing, shadow samples. Include a small thyme motif cutout preview.
Typography: compact English UI type plus Japanese typography section with headings, body, captions, numerals, and examples such as "タイム", "材料", "下ごしらえ", "分量", "調理時間".
Components: primary and secondary buttons, icon buttons, inputs, select, textarea, checkbox, radio, switch, tabs, badges, alert, card, table rows, command/search palette, compact sidebar navigation, recipe metric cards, pantry stock cards, prep checklist, ingredient table, nutrition chart, timer bars, loading/empty/error/success states.
Texture/materials: subtle tiny-leaf rhythm, dark stone-garden grain, pale lilac blossom pin marks, warm stem dividers, compact 8px card rhythm, restrained dark-mode shadows.
Text constraints: title must be Morphous Thyme. Do not use the words Mint, Rosemary, Basil, or Lavender as a system title.
Visual constraints: every visible UI element uses 8px radius or less; labels must fit inside containers; professional shadcn/tweakcn-style product design board; no marketing hero, no unrelated colors, no pure black flat background, no blue/purple gradients, no watermark.
